mapper.select: SELECT id, datasource_id, table_name, table_comment, biz_name, biz_description, is_enabled, schema_version, update_time FROM table_metadata WHERE datasource_id = #{datasourceId} ORDER BY table_name

SELECT id, table_id, column_name, column_type, column_comment, biz_name, biz_description, example_value, enum_desc, is_sensitive, mask_type, is_queryable, is_filterable, is_aggregatable FROM column_metadata WHERE table_id = #{tableId} ORDER BY id
SELECT id, datasource_id, source_table, source_column, target_table, target_column, relation_type, description, update_time FROM table_relation WHERE datasource_id = #{datasourceId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE table_metadata SET table_comment = #{tableComment}, biz_name = #{bizName}, biz_description = #{bizDescription}, is_enabled = #{isEnabled}, schema_version = #{schemaVersion} WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE column_metadata SET column_comment = #{columnComment}, biz_name = #{bizName}, biz_description = #{bizDescription}, example_value = #{exampleValue}, enum_desc = #{enumDesc}, is_sensitive = #{isSensitive}, mask_type = #{maskType}, is_queryable = #{isQueryable}, is_filterable = #{isFilterable}, is_aggregatable = #{isAggregatable} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO table_relation ( datasource_id, source_table, source_column, target_table, target_column, relation_type, description ) VALUES ( #{datasourceId}, #{sourceTable}, #{sourceColumn}, #{targetTable}, #{targetColumn}, #{relationType}, #{description} )
